query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(720003, 'Who wrote the three epistles of John?', 'multiple_choice', '["The apostle John", "John the Baptist", "John Mark", "An unknown John"]', 'The apostle John', 1),
(720003, 'What false teaching did John combat in his epistles?', 'multiple_choice', '["Early forms of Gnosticism denying Christ''s humanity", "Judaizers requiring circumcision", "Those denying the resurrection", "Those promoting emperor worship"]', 'Early forms of Gnosticism denying Christ''s humanity', 2),
(720003, 'According to 1 John 1:9, what happens when we confess our sins?', 'multiple_choice', '["God forgives and cleanses us", "We earn salvation", "We become sinless", "We avoid all consequences"]', 'God forgives and cleanses us', 3),
(720003, 'What are the three tests of genuine faith in 1 John?', 'multiple_choice', '["Doctrinal, moral, and social tests", "Faith, hope, and love", "Baptism, communion, and prayer", "Knowledge, wisdom, and understanding"]', 'Doctrinal, moral, and social tests', 4),
(720003, 'According to 1 John 4:8, what is God?', 'multiple_choice', '["Love", "Light only", "Justice only", "Power only"]', 'Love', 5),
(720003, 'What does 1 John 4:1-3 instruct believers to do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Test the spirits", "Accept all teachers", "Avoid all teaching", "Trust their feelings"]', 'Test the spirits', 6),
(720003, 'To whom is 2 John addressed?', 'multiple_choice', '["The elect lady and her children", "Timothy", "Titus", "The church at Rome"]', 'The elect lady and her children', 7),
(720003, 'Who does 3 John commend for hospitality?', 'multiple_choice', '["Gaius", "Diotrephes", "Demetrius", "John"]', 'Gaius', 8),
(720003, 'According to John, who is an antichrist?', 'multiple_choice', '["Anyone who denies Christ came in the flesh", "Only the final Antichrist", "Roman emperors", "Jewish leaders"]', 'Anyone who denies Christ came in the flesh', 9),
(720003, 'Who does 3 John condemn for prideful rejection of apostolic authority?', 'multiple_choice', '["Diotrephes", "Gaius", "Demetrius", "The elect lady"]', 'Diotrephes', 10),
(720003, 'Describe John''s three tests of genuine faith and explain how they help believers distinguish true Christianity from counterfeits.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The doctrinal test requires believing Jesus came in the flesh; the moral test requires obeying God''s commands; the social test requires loving fellow believers. Together they identify genuine faith.', 11);
